creator: rkoberman@gmail.com
text:
I have gotten ImageMagick to build thr0ugh the ugly work-around of symlinking /usr/local/llvm40/lib/libomp.so to /usr/local/lib/libomp.so. I can also confirm that it builds correctly on my server running 11.1-RELEASE-p4 with no symlinked library.

As a result, I suspect the issue might be the old 1.1-PRERELEASE system. That system is stuck there as the next commit to STABLE (320666) broke an application I need due to a bug in qt4. I hope to convert the application, avidemux to qt5 which is supported upstream, but not by the FreeBSD port.

As a result, I suspect this is an issue with my system that is not applicable ot others and not a bug.

Feel free to close.
